title: 1 BHK Apartment in Lahdoigarh Chariali, Teok, Jorhat
description: Spacious 1BHK apartment in Lahdoigarh Chariali, Teok, Jorhat. Features include a large drawing-cum-dining hall, modular kitchen with exhaust, 1 well-sized bedroom with built-in wardrobes, 1 modern bathroom with premium CP fittings, and a balcony overlooking the Brahmaputra river valley. Society amenities include earthquake-resistant RCC structure, 24/7 security with CCTV, backup generator, rainwater harvesting, children's play area, and covered two-wheeler parking. Walking distance to Lokpriya Gopinath Bordoloi International Airport road and GS Road. Schools like Don Bosco and Sarala Birla are within 3km.

title: Commercial Shop Space in Lahdoigarh Chariali, Teok, Jorhat
description: Prime ground-floor commercial shop available for rent on the main Lahdoigarh Chariali road, Jorhat. 450 sqft carpet area with 12-foot ceiling height, glass frontage with roller shutter, and attached washroom. Ideal for retail, pharmacy, salon, mobile shop, or small office. Separate electric meter and water connection. High footfall location near Six Mile Flyover, with ample roadside parking. Previously operated as a garment store. Available for immediate possession with 11-month renewable lease. No brokerage — deal directly with the owner.
